user_prompt: My smelting furnace is ready for reset
prayer:

Initiate the reset protocol upon the smelting furnace, monitoring the expulsion of impure fluxes.
Sanctify the renewed core of the smelting furnace through diagnostic binaric hymns of compliance.

Command the reset across the bike squadron's noospheric links, anointing treads with lustral mechadendrites.
Verify the squadron's purified thrusters via litanies of motile restoration.
